mentions.note: Experiencing appalling value destruction; liquor industry disruption is real and permanent, not transient.

New CEO Nick Fink (ex-Fortune Brands Jim Beam); reports Wed after-close; top beer Modelo; liquor challenged by GLP-1s but beer seeing subtle turn and ready-to-drink cocktails turning; Cramer thinks worthwhile to buy ahead; 'if true, STZ is the one you want to be in.'

Alcohol bottom emerging; Q1 showed unexpected depletion inflection (+0.6% vs. -1.4% expected), first positive in four quarters. TD Cowen upgraded to 190 target. New CEO, Cinco de Mayo/World Cup catalysts, cheap at <14× earnings with 2.5% dividend.
Last quarter smacked of earnings bottom in beer despite Street negativity; historic rotation seller. Now 3% yield at 130; Mexico World Cup loss already priced.
